meanings.definition: walking with a slow dragging motion without lifting your feet
examples: from his shambling I assumed he was very old

meanings.definition: the act of mixing cards haphazardly

examples: he shuffled out of the room
We heard his feet shuffling down the hall

meanings.definition: move about, move back and forth
examples: He shuffled his funds among different accounts in various countries so as to avoid the IRS

meanings.definition: mix so as to make a random order or arrangement
